title: cheilanthes duclouxii
intro: Cheilanthes duclouxii, also known as Doodia or Chinese salad fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Cheilanthes duclouxii can be prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or decoction, and is often consumed as a supplement or used topically in traditional medicine.
